case_title: AMERICAN AGENCIES OF SAN FRANCISCO vs. BRUNNER, GWENDOLYN

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF RENEWAL OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN AGENCIES OF SAN FRANCISCO
DECLARATION OF ACCRUED ONTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN AGENCIES OF SAN FRANCISCO

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC. 683.110 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN AGENCIES OF SAN FRANCISCO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRUNNER, GWENDOLYN $1,356.95 PRINCIPAL, $1,342.38 INTEREST, $14.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,713.33 ALL FURTHER PROCESSING TO BE DONE BY DEFAULT SECTION
